queries.question: What journalist is working on the health crisis?
queries.sql: SELECT Journalist.fullname FROM Journalist JOIN Story ON Story.journalistId = Journalist.id WHERE Story.title = 'Health Crisis'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?journalist a :Journalists .
  ?story a :Stories .
  ?story p:hasJournalist ?journalist .
  ?journalist p:name ?fullname .
  ?story p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Health Crisis")
}

queries.question: Who is working on the health crisis?
queries.sql: SELECT News_Agency.name, Journalist.fullname FROM Journalist JOIN Story ON Story.journalistId = Journalist.id JOIN News_Agency ON Story.agencyId = News_Agency.id  WHERE Story.title = 'Health Crisis'

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?journalist a :Journalists .
  ?story a :Stories .
  ?story p:hasJournalist ?journalist .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?story p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?news_agency p:name ?name .
  ?journalist p:name ?fullname .
  ?story p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Health Crisis")
}
